nasb.text: The sons of Gad and the sons of Reuben spoke to Moses, saying, “Your servants will do just as my lord commands.

esv.text: And the people of Gad and the people of Reuben said to Moses, “Your servants will do as my lord commands.

cnv.text: 迦得子孫和流本子孫告訴摩西：“你僕人必照著我主吩咐的去行。

ccb.text: 迦得和吕便的子孙对摩西说：“仆人们一定遵命而行。
